investigation_steps: Check if any login succeeded after failures
Review all accounts targeted by this IP
Check for lateral movement after compromise
escalate_if: Successful login detected after brute force

immediate_actions: Review firewall rules for exposed ports
investigation_steps: Identify which ports were found open
Check if scanning IP attempted connections after scan
Correlate with auth logs for follow-on activity
escalate_if: Open ports discovered on critical systems
Scanning IP appears in auth logs
Scan covers large port range in short time

immediate_actions: Force password reset on affected account
investigation_steps: Review all actions taken after successful login
Check for data access or exfiltration
Identify all accounts accessed from this IP
preventive_measures: Review and tighten account access policies
